description: Single source of truth for the tools agentmesh orchestrates: MCP servers registered per-client by setup/register-mcp.js, token compression through hooks, and the agentmesh mode layer shipped as this plugin's skills/commands.

rtk.description: Rewrites Bash/shell tool calls to their token-compressed rtk equivalents (rtk git, rtk gh, rtk grep, ...). Not an MCP server -- wired as a PreToolUse hook via hooks/rtk-rewrite.js, a thin node wrapper (required so the hook's command field stays shell-agnostic) around RTK's own native `rtk hook <client>` subcommand. Bundled into hooks/claude-hooks.json and hooks/copilot-hooks.json. Nothing for register-mcp.js to do here: installing the plugin is enough.

mesh.description: Synchronized stack conductor: one `/mesh <level>` drives the required Ponytail companion to the same level and RTK to matching compression (ultra-compact at ultra), and sets CodeGraph/Serena discovery posture and output verbosity. Ships directly with the plugin; coordinates the tool stack without another runtime dependency.
